title: The Sticky Situation
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's farm honey wins big, but robotic bees and a fake-honey rival run by Madame No threaten everything 🐝

q.en: Where does Geronimo go for his spring vacation?

options.en: The New Mouse City Film Festival

explain.en: Geronimo bikes to Stilton Farm, the most mouserific place in the world, for his weekend vacation.
explain.zh: Geronimo 骑自行车来到 Stilton 农场——世界上最美妙的地方，度他的周末假期。

q.en: Who surprises Geronimo with a beekeeping plan to make honey?
q.zh: 谁给了 Geronimo 一个养蜂产蜜的惊喜计划？

explain.en: Trap reveals a surprise: beekeeper suits and a plan to make 'Stilton Farm's Famouse Honey' with the farm's bees.
explain.zh: Trap 亮出惊喜：养蜂服，以及用农场蜜蜂制作“Stilton 农场名牌蜂蜜”的计划。

q.en: Who are Melanie and Alpine Goldendrop, and what do they give Geronimo?
q.zh: Melanie 和 Alpine Goldendrop 是谁，他们给了 Geronimo 什么？

options.en: Bee experts who gift their hives and manuka plants
options.zh: 养蜂专家，把他们的蜂箱和麦卢卡花送给他

options.en: The owners of the Bee Mine factory

explain.en: The Goldendrops are bee experts who, ready for a break, give Geronimo their hives and manuka plants to keep the tradition going.
explain.zh: Goldendrop 夫妇是养蜂专家，准备歇息，于是把他们的蜂箱和麦卢卡花送给 Geronimo，让传统延续下去。

q.en: What is the name of the mysterious new honey factory next to the farm?
q.zh: 农场旁边那家神秘的新蜂蜜工厂叫什么名字？

explain.en: A huge new building appears with a sign reading 'BEE MINE — All-Natural Honey,' becoming big competition.
explain.zh: 一座巨大的新建筑立起，招牌写着“Bee Mine——纯天然蜂蜜”，成了强大的竞争对手。

q.en: What new medicine appears for the stomachaches affecting rodents?
q.zh: 针对老鼠们胃痛而出现的那种新药叫什么？

explain.en: As rodents complain of stomachaches, a new 'SUPER-EFFECTIVE' medicine called TummyFix appears everywhere.
explain.zh: 当老鼠们抱怨胃痛时，一种名为 TummyFix 的“超级有效”新药到处出现。

q.en: Which honey wins the 'Sweet Taste of Mouse Island' competition?
q.zh: 哪一种蜂蜜赢得了“鼠岛甜美滋味”大赛？

options.zh: Stilton 农场的麦卢卡蜂蜜

explain.en: The judges declare the winner is 'Stilton Farm' — their special manuka honey, made with love and care.
explain.zh: 评委宣布获胜者是“Stilton 农场”——他们用爱心和细心制作的特别麦卢卡蜂蜜。

q.en: Who wants to buy Stilton Farm from Geronimo?
q.zh: 谁想从 Geronimo 手里买下 Stilton 农场？

explain.en: Madame No arrives in her leopard-print car and offers to buy the whole farm, including the beehives.
explain.zh: Madame No 坐着豹纹汽车出现，提出买下整座农场，包括那些蜂箱。

q.en: What are the metallic 'bees' that chase Geronimo actually?
q.zh: 追着 Geronimo 的那些金属“蜜蜂”其实是什么？

options.zh: 名叫 BeeBot 的机器人
带摄像头的小型无人机

explain.en: Hercule finds a box labeled 'Beetronics Synthetic Wings' and a manual: the metallic bees are robots, not real bees.
explain.zh: Hercule 找到一个标着“Beetronics 合成翅膀”的盒子和说明书：那些金属蜜蜂是机器人，不是真蜜蜂。

q.en: How does Hercule arrive to help Geronimo with the bee problem?
q.zh: Hercule 是如何赶来帮 Geronimo 解决蜜蜂危机的？

options.en: In a beecopter (bee-shaped helicopter) wearing a bee costume
options.zh: 开着蜜蜂造型的直升机（beecopter），穿着蜜蜂装

explain.en: A striped bee-painted helicopter called the beecopter lands; Hercule jumps out wearing a black-and-yellow bee disguise.
explain.zh: 一架漆着条纹、像蜜蜂的直升机 beecopter 降落，Hercule 穿着黑白黄相间的蜜蜂伪装服跳了下来。

q.en: Who is Professor No, and what machine makes the fake honey?
q.zh: Professor No 是谁，又是哪台机器制造了假蜂蜜？

options.en: Madame No's cousin; the Honey Machine 5000
options.zh: Madame No 的表兄弟；Honey Machine 5000

options.en: A Bee Mine manager; a blender
options.zh: Bee Mine 的经理；一台搅拌机

explain.en: Professor No, Madame No's ruthless inventor cousin, runs the Honey Machine 5000 that mixes fragrance, color, thickener, and flavoring into fake honey.
explain.zh: Professor No 是 Madame No 那位冷酷的发明家表兄弟，他操控 Honey Machine 5000，把香精、色素、增稠剂和调味料混合成假蜂蜜。
